title: BareBones x BetterArchology
description: Simply a texture pack that retexturizes the betterarchology in barebones style.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79a6d11f62919b5e7175fffb23efc5ae80c9721d_0.webp)

Simply a texture pack that retexturizes the betterarchology in barebones style.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/996b57990e1b446d497d40c43379a3ac6157f291_0.webp)

⚠️CREDITS
Texture style https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones
For the mod https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology

This texture pack was created to complement my modpack https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/minenhanced
